resources.title: CSAwesome Interactive Textbook
resources.description: Free, comprehensive interactive textbook with runnable Java examples and practice problems. Aligned with the AP CS A curriculum.

resources.title: AP CSA Exam Prep Free Textbook
resources.description: Free online textbook aligned with the 2025-2026 College Board curriculum, covering all 4 units with clear explanations.

resources.title: CodingBat Java Practice
resources.description: Free live coding problems organized by topic. Instant feedback on your Java code. Great for building fluency.

resources.title: CS++ Daily Practice Questions
resources.description: 5 rotating AP CS A practice questions daily from a pool of 500+. Free daily practice to build consistency.

resources.title: CodeHS AP CSA Resource Hub
resources.description: Hundreds of autograded Java practice problems organized by skill and level. Includes AP CSA Question of the Day.

resources.title: College Board AP CS A Official Page
resources.description: Official AP CS A course page with exam information, scoring guidelines, and sample questions from College Board.

resources.title: College Board Past FRQs
resources.description: Official archive of past Free Response Questions with scoring guidelines. Essential for FRQ practice.

resources.title: AP CS Debugger — 2026 Changes
resources.description: Detailed breakdown of what changed for the 2026 AP CS A exam: new topics, removed topics, and format changes.

resources.title: AP CSA FRQ Archive (2004-2025)
resources.description: Complete archive of all past AP CS A FRQs from 2004-2025 with detailed Java solutions organized by year.

resources.title: College Board AP CS A Review Videos
resources.description: Official and community review videos covering key AP CS A concepts, exam strategies, and walkthroughs.

resources.title: r/APStudents Community
resources.description: Active Reddit community for AP students. Get answers to questions, share study tips, and find study partners.

resources.title: Java SE Documentation
resources.description: Official Java API documentation. Reference for String, ArrayList, Math, and other classes used on the AP exam.

resources.title: VisuAlgo — Algorithm Visualizations
resources.description: Interactive visualizations of sorting algorithms, searching, and data structures. See how algorithms work step by step.

resources.title: JDoodle Online Java Compiler
resources.description: Free online Java compiler and IDE. Write, compile, and run Java code in your browser without installing anything.
